claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Fireworks provides the platform to build your Generative AI capabilities — optimized for speed, quality, and cost.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The homepage contains a link labeled 'Pricing' that can be clicked to access the pricing page.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: "Get started fast with our Build SDK, plus a full developer toolkit for testing, building agents, and running evals."

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Seamlessly integrate Fireworks AI with best-in-class platforms, tools, and infrastructure to accelerate model deployment and enhance end-user experiences.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: "We value your privacy" and "We may store and/or access information on a device and process personal data, such as your IP address and browsing data, for personalised advertising and content."
